heading: Core Platform Engineering
title: Fullstack Tool Developer (React & Node.js)
shortDesc: Build internal systems that power the entire VTC ecosystem and its engineering tools.
longDesc: As a Fullstack Tool Developer in VTC, you will design and develop internal platforms, dashboards, and developer tools that support all divisions including NFRAC, ITTacademy, and Antar Core.
responsibilities: Develop scalable internal dashboards for system monitoring and analytics.
Build reusable React component libraries for VTC-wide use.
Design and maintain Node.js backend services powering internal tools.

heading: Systems & Backend Infrastructure
title: Backend Tool Engineer (Java / Python)
shortDesc: Engineer the backbone services that support internal tooling and automation systems.
longDesc: You will work on high-performance backend systems that power automation, data pipelines, and internal APIs across VTC’s engineering ecosystem.
responsibilities: Build internal APIs for tool orchestration and automation workflows.
Optimize system performance for large-scale internal operations.
Implement secure authentication and role-based access control systems.

heading: Developer Experience (DX)
title: DevTools Engineer (CLI / Platform Tools)
shortDesc: Improve developer productivity by building powerful internal tooling and CLI systems.
longDesc: Join the VTC DevTools team to build command-line tools, automation scripts, and internal SDKs that streamline development across all divisions.
responsibilities: Design CLI tools for deployment, monitoring, and automation.
Build internal SDKs for cross-team usage.
Improve CI/CD workflows and internal development pipelines.

heading: Frontend Systems & UX Tools
title: Frontend Tool Engineer (React.js / UI Systems)
shortDesc: Design internal UI systems and reusable component frameworks for VTC tools.
longDesc: You will build and maintain the design system and UI infrastructure that powers all internal VTC applications, ensuring consistency and performance.
responsibilities: Build reusable UI component libraries in React.
Develop internal design systems and documentation portals.
Optimize frontend performance for tool-heavy applications.

heading: Automation & Intelligence Layer
title: AI Systems Engineer (Tooling & Automation)
shortDesc: Integrate AI into internal tools for automation, optimization, and decision support.
longDesc: Work on embedding machine learning and intelligent automation into VTC systems to enhance productivity across engineering, education, and infrastructure teams.
responsibilities: Build AI-powered internal assistants for developer workflows.
Implement automation pipelines using ML models and APIs.
Enhance internal tools with predictive analytics capabilities.
